prompt: A 3D anime-style illustration of four high school girls in a Japanese classroom bathed in {argument name="lighting" default="warm afternoon sunlight"}. In the foreground on the right, a girl with {argument name="foreground right character hair" default="long coral-brown hair in a ponytail with a white bow"} and green eyes reaches her hand out towards the viewer with a warm smile. In the foreground on the left, a girl with {argument name="foreground left character hair" default="short pink hair with red hairclips"} and pink eyes stands with her arms crossed, looking slightly annoyed. In the midground, a girl with long dark purple hair stands calmly holding a book, while in the background, a girl with short coral-pink hair and a red bow waves cheerfully. All four girls wear matching school uniforms consisting of {argument name="uniform style" default="grey blazers, brown sweater vests, red ribbons, and blue pleated skirts"}. The classroom features wooden floors, desks, and a green chalkboard. In the top left corner, there is a circular logo with a pink border containing the stylized text "{argument name="logo text" default="DOKI DOKI Literature Club!"}" and a large pink "3D" below it, decorated with a green pencil and a pink heart. The image has a high-quality 3D render aesthetic, resembling video game promotional art with soft lighting and depth of field.
translatedPrompt: 一张 3D 动漫风格的插画，展示了四名女高中生身处日本教室中，沐浴在 {argument name="lighting" default="温暖的午后阳光"} 下。在右侧前景中，一位留着 {argument name="foreground right character hair" default="系着白色蝴蝶结的珊瑚棕色长马尾"}、拥有绿色眼睛的女孩带着温暖的微笑向观众伸出手。在左侧前景中，一位留着 {argument name="foreground left character hair" default="粉色短发配红色发夹"}、拥有粉色眼睛的女孩双臂交叉站立，表情略显烦恼。在中景处，一位留着深紫色长发的女孩平静地拿着一本书站着；而在背景中，一位留着珊瑚粉色短发、系着红色蝴蝶结的女孩正愉快地挥手。四名女孩都穿着统一的校服，包括 {argument name="uniform style" default="灰色西装外套、棕色针织背心、红色丝带和蓝色百褶裙"}。教室里有木地板、课桌和一块绿色黑板。左上角有一个带有粉色边框的圆形 Logo，其中包含程式化的文字“{argument name="logo text" default="DOKI DOKI Literature Club!"}”，下方是一个巨大的粉色“3D”字样，并装饰着一支绿色铅笔和一个粉色爱心。整张图片具有高质量的 3D 渲染美感，类似于带有柔和光影和景深效果的电子游戏宣传艺术图。

breakdown.creativeCore: 3D 动漫视觉小说游戏封面：生成一张 3D 动漫风格的宣传图，展示四名身处教室的女高中生，并包含可自定义的游戏 Logo。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 空间概念、建筑场景、游戏场景、产品场景盒子

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 空间/场景 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: anime, 3d]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: soft light, depth of field]。

Text requirements:
文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
